title: stelis capitata
intro: Stelis capitata, also known as the Ball Orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique, rounded inflorescences. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis capitata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis capitata are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be dried, powdered, or infused in hot water to create teas, tinctures, or ointments for medicinal use.
